name: batomon
title: Batomon Showdown Demo
runtime: godot-sdl2 fork + GodotSteam arm64 + Steam API stub

portmaster.desc: Launcher for the Batomon Showdown demo. Game data is user supplied.
portmaster.inst: Place the prepared batomon_showdown.pck in batomon/gamedata/.

notes: Self-contained Godot 4 launcher. The PCK must be prepared separately: decrypt/repack or build a runtime with the matching Godot script key, then patch GodotSteam for linux.arm64.
